applyTo: "**/*.R"

# R Coding Instructions

This Copilot instruction file is a compatibility adapter.
The canonical project guidance lives in `.ai/r-coding.md`.

Read `.ai/r-coding.md` before applying this instruction route. Function
documentation and tests are covered by `.ai/r-functions.md`.
